cases.description: Existence probe only: NOW() is volatile (changes every recalculation), so there is no fixed expected value
cases.expected_note: Non-deterministic by design; only check the engine recognizes the function and returns a plausible date-time serial

cases.description: Two NOW() calls inside one cell evaluate in the same recalculation pass, so their difference is exactly 0 — a deterministic assertion about a volatile function (N() keeps the result a plain number instead of a duration-formatted cell)
NOW() includes today's date plus a time fraction, so it is always >= TODAY() within one recalculation
